All planned code changes are complete. Here's a summary:

### Changes made

1. **`django/db/models/fields/__init__.py`** (line 1712) — Changed `'path': self.path` to `'path': self.path() if callable(self.path) else self.path` in `FilePathField.formfield()`

2. **`tests/model_fields/test_filepathfield.py`** (NEW) — 3 tests: string path, callable path, callable evaluated each time

3. **`tests/field_deconstruction/tests.py`** — Added module-level `generate_test_path()` function and `test_file_path_field_callable_path` test method

4. **`docs/ref/models/fields.txt`** — Added callable path documentation with example and migration serialization note

5. **`docs/releases/3.0.txt`** — Added release note under Models section

### Tests to run

```bash
python tests/runtests.py tests.model_fields.test_filepathfield
python tests/runtests.py tests.field_deconstruction
python tests/runtests.py tests.forms_tests.field_tests.test_filepathfield
python tests/runtests.py tests.model_fields
```

Please approve the test execution or run these commands manually.
